label: 1. PLC Communication
info:
Lectura y escritura de variables del PLC Schneider vía Modbus TCP.
Reads sensors, vision, process status and controls actuators.

label: 2. Dashboard & Commands
info: Dashboard web y controles de mando remoto

label: 3. Telegram Alerts
info: Monitoreo de umbrales y envío de alertas por Telegram

label: 4. Logging & Reports
info: Registro de datos en CSV y generación de informes

label: 5. AI Vision
info: Integración con detector de colores Python vía MQTT

name: 🎨 Dark Industrial Theme
format:
<style>
/* ═══ TEMA INDUSTRIAL OSCURO PREMIUM v2 ═══ */

/* --- Page background --- */
.nr-dashboard-theme ui-view,
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-layout,
#nr-dashboard-main {
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0a0e27 0%, #0d1b2a 40%, #1b2838 100%) !important;
}

/* --- Navigation bar --- */
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-toolbar {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0d1b2a 0%, #162a4a 100%) !important;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #00d2ff44 !important;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5) !important;
}

/* --- Cards (groups) --- */
md-card {
  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #16213e, #1a2744) !important;
  color: #e8ecf1 !important;
  border-radius: 14px !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 210, 255, 0.12) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.03) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease !important;
}
md-card:hover {
  border-color: rgba(0, 210, 255, 0.25) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.05) !important;
}

/* --- Card titles --- */
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardtitle {
  color: #00d2ff !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  letter-spacing: 1.5px !important;
  font-size: 12px !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 210, 255, 0.15) !important;
  padding-bottom: 10px !important;
  margin-bottom: 8px !important;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,210,255,0.06), transparent) !important;
  padding-left: 12px !important;
}

/* --- Global text visibility fix --- */
body, .nr-dashboard-theme,
.nr-dashboard-theme p,
.nr-dashboard-theme span,
.nr-dashboard-theme div,
.nr-dashboard-theme label,
.nr-dashboard-theme .md-label,
.nr-dashboard-theme md-input-container label {
  color: #e8ecf1 !important;
}

/* --- SVG text (gauges, charts axes) --- */
.nr-dashboard-theme text,
.nr-dashboard-theme .nv-axis text,
.nr-dashboard-theme .nv-axislabel,
.nr-dashboard-theme .nv-legend text,
.nr-dashboard-theme .nv-pieLabels text {
  fill: #c8d0da !important;
}

/* --- ui_text values & labels --- */
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-widget .ui-text-value {
  color: #ffffff !important;
  font-weight: 600 !important;
  font-size: 15px !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-widget .ui-text-label {
  color: #8dabc4 !important;
  font-weight: 500 !important;
  font-size: 13px !important;
}

/* --- Buttons --- */
.nr-dashboard-theme md-button {
  border-radius: 10px !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px !important;
  transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.3) !important;
  text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3) !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme md-button:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4) !important;
  filter: brightness(1.1) !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme md-button:active {
  transform: translateY(0px) !important;
}

/* --- Switch toggle --- */
.nr-dashboard-theme md-switch .md-bar {
  background-color: #384a6a !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme md-switch.md-checked .md-bar {
  background-color: #00d2ff88 !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme md-switch.md-checked .md-thumb {
  background-color: #00d2ff !important;
}

/* --- Slider --- */
.nr-dashboard-theme md-slider .md-track-fill { background-color: #00d2ff !important; }
.nr-dashboard-theme md-slider .md-thumb { background-color: #00d2ff !important; }


/* --- Chart area --- */
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-widget canvas {
  border-radius: 8px !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nv-area { opacity: 0.25 !important; }

/* --- md-list items --- */
.nr-dashboard-theme md-list-item,
.nr-dashboard-theme md-list-item .md-list-item-text p,
.nr-dashboard-theme md-list-item .md-list-item-text h3,
.nr-dashboard-theme md-list-item span {
  color: #e8ecf1 !important;
}

/* --- Sidebar navigation --- */
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-sidebar,
.nr-dashboard-theme md-sidenav {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #0d1b2a, #16213e) !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme md-sidenav md-list-item {
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,210,255,0.08) !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme md-sidenav md-list-item:hover {
  background: rgba(0,210,255,0.08) !important;
}

/* --- Scrollbar --- */
.nr-dashboard-theme ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
.nr-dashboard-theme ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #0d1b2a; }
.nr-dashboard-theme ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #00d2ff44; border-radius: 3px; }
.nr-dashboard-theme ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: #00d2ff88; }

/* --- Animations --- */
@keyframes pulse-alert {
  0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.5); }
  70% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(255, 0, 0, 0); }
  100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(255, 0, 0, 0); }
}
@keyframes blink-green {
  0%,100% { opacity: 1; }
  50% { opacity: 0.3; }
}
@keyframes glow-cyan {
  0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 5px #00d2ff33; }
  50% { box-shadow: 0 0 20px #00d2ff55; }
}

/* --- Chart light background (para legibilidad) --- */
.chart-light-bg,
.chart-light-bg canvas {
  background: transparent !important;
}

/* Target the card containing the chart-light-bg class */
md-card:has(.chart-light-bg) {
  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #e8eef5, #f0f4fa) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 120, 200, 0.15) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.15), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.8) !important;
}

/* Fallback: also target via parent widget selector */
.nr-dashboard-widget.chart-light-bg {
  background: transparent !important;
}

/* The chart title on light background */
md-card:has(.chart-light-bg) .nr-dashboard-cardtitle {
  color: #1a3556 !important;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,120,200,0.08), transparent) !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,120,200,0.15) !important;
}


            
/* Forzar que CUALQUIER texto del título del widget con fondo claro sea muy oscuro */
.nr-dashboard-theme .chart-light-bg .nr-dashboard-cardtitle,
.nr-dashboard-theme md-card:has(.chart-light-bg) .nr-dashboard-cardtitle,
.nr-dashboard-widget.chart-light-bg .title,
.nr-dashboard-theme .nv-chart .nv-title {
    color: #1e293b !important;
    font-weight: 800 !important;
    text-shadow: none !important;
}
</style>

name: ═══ PLC VARIABLE READING — SORTING STATION ═══
info:
Mapeo real de Factory IO Sorting Station:

SENSORES (Coils 0-6):
  %M0=At exit, %M1=Start, %M2=Reset,
  %M3=Stop, %M4=Emergency, %M5=Auto, %M6=FIO Running

VISION (Holding Reg 0):
  %MW0=Vision sensor (0=nada,1=azul,2=verde,3=metal)

ACTUADORES (Inputs 10-21):
  %M10=Entry conv, %M11=Stop blade, %M12=Exit conv,
  %M13-14=Sort1, %M15-16=Sort2, %M17-18=Sort3,
  %M19=Start light, %M20=Reset light, %M21=Stop light

REGISTROS PROCESO (%MW20-25):
  %MW20=Estado, %MW21=Total, %MW22=Blue,
  %MW23=Green, %MW24=Metal, %MW25=Velocidad

REMOTE COMMANDS (Node-RED → PLC):
  %M30=Start, %M31=Stop, %M32=Pause, %M33=Reset, %M34=Emergency
  %MW30=Setpoint velocidad

name: ═══ TELEGRAM ALERTS ═══
info:
Monitorea variables del proceso y envía alertas por Telegram.
Umbrales: Velocidad>90%, Total>50 piezas, Estado emergencia.
Anti-flooding: máximo 1 alerta por minuto.
